query: Raubichi Ski Marathon cross country ski race Raubichi

videos.title: Second Sprint win in a row for Sivert Guttorm Bakken in Minsk-Raubichi
videos.description: Following his win in the first competition of IBU Cup 8, Sivert Guttorm Bakken was again at the top of the podium in the second sprint in Minsk-Raubichi.

videos.title: IBU OECH Sprint Gold for Elisabeth Hoegberg in Minsk-Raubichi
videos.description: Sweden's Elisabeth Hoegberg claims the Women's Sprint  Gold medal at the IBU OECH in Minsk-Raubichi.

videos.title: Stefanie Scherer claims the Mass Start 60 in IBU Cup 8
videos.description: Stefanie Scherer finished the season in the best way possible, claiming the final Mass Start 60 in Minsk-Raubichi.

videos.title: IBU OECH Pursuit Gold Medal for Elena Kruchinkina
videos.description: The last competition of the IBU OECH 2020 saw another Gold Medal won by Belarus; thanks to a strong pursuit performance by Elena Kruchinkina at Minsk-Raubichi.

videos.title: Sergey Bocharnikov claims Pursuit Gold at IBU OECH 2020
videos.description: In front of ecstatic home fans, Sergey Bocharnikov claimed his second Gold Medal of IBU OECH 2020 in Minsk-Raubichi.

videos.title: Ingela Andersson claims the second Women’s Sprint of IBU Cup 8
videos.description: Following in the footsteps of her teammate Elisabeth Hoegberg, who won the previous day’s competition, Ingela Andersson claimed the win in the second sprint in Minsk-Raubichi.

videos.title: Matvey Eliseev claims the Men's Sprint at IBU OECH 2020
videos.description: Finishing at the top of the podium in the Men Sprint in Minsk-Raubichi, Russia’s Matvey Eliseev claimed his first ever individual IBU OECH title.

videos.title: Sivert Guttorm Bakken claims the Sprint in IBU CUP 8
videos.description: Norway's Sivert Guttorm Bakken finished first in the Sprint in Minsk-Raubichi, claiming his first win of the season.

videos.title: Let's go, Birkies!
videos.description:
As North America’s largest cross-country ski race, the Birkie brings thousands of skiers together every year to celebrate endurance, community – and the legend of Prince Haakon, who got rescued during Norwegian civil war by soldiers wearing the birch-bark leggings. 

Today the American Birkebeiner race with a distance over 50 km is part of the Worldloppet series and on a par with events like the legendary Vasaloppet race. We’re proud to be part of this incredible event and can’t wait to create new memories on the snow. See you out there. ❄️💛

videos.title: #OECH19 Highlights from Minsk-Raubichi
videos.description: The Open European Championships took place this year in Minsk-Raubichi, Belarus. Suspense, battles and big stars were plentiful, dive into the highlights to relive the thrills!
